changed.title: Review-output evidence traceability needs one clearer label

before.title: Review-output evidence traceability needs one clearer label
before.summary: The review-output packet names a reusable concern but still relies on a coarse evidence label.
before.recommendation: Keep the finding generic and add one clearer sanitized evidence label before caller-owned routing.

before.title: Caller-owned routing remains explicit
before.summary: The comparison fixture leaves approval, routing, and remediation ownership outside AIQL.
before.recommendation: Keep downstream routing in the embedding repo.
